source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Define selected government and politics terms

sections.heading: Relevant Words
sections.content: The note defines government, politics, ballot box, constituency, democracy, despot, electoral college, nomination, political party, voting age, and election.

sections.heading: Learning Tasks
sections.content: Define selected government and politics terms. Use them in sentences. Build civic vocabulary from the lesson.
